prompt: What is the average reported workload hours for each course?

inputData.question: What is the average reported workload hours for each course?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"What is the average reported workload hours for each course?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"What is the average reported workload hours for each course?"},"startedAt":1771803440662,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Join course_evaluations -> enrollments -> course_sections -> courses and compute AVG(workload_hours) per course (NULLs excluded). Return all courses (avg NULL when no reported workload) and order deterministically by course code.","sql":"SELECT
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.workload_hours)::numeric, 2) AS average_workload_hours
FROM public.courses c
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments en ON en.course_section_id = cs.id
LEFT JOIN public.course_evaluations ce ON ce.enrollment_id = en.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code ASC;","assumptions":["The relationship path is course_evaluations.enrollment_id -> enrollments.id -> enrollments.course_section_id -> course_sections.id -> course_sections.course_id -> courses.id (confirmed via schema inspection).","workload_hours is numeric and AVG should exclude NULLs; courses with no reported workload will show average_workload_hours as NULL.","I rounded the average to 2 decimal places for readability."]},"endedAt":1771803471862},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.workload_hours)::numeric, 2) AS average_workload_hours
FROM public.courses c
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments en ON en.course_section_id = cs.id
LEFT JOIN public.course_evaluations ce ON ce.enrollment_id = en.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code ASC;"},"startedAt":1771803471871,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT

GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code visualization.description: Average reported workload hours for each course
visualization.title: Average Reported Workload Hours by Course

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.workload_hours)::numeric, 2) AS average_workload_hours
FROM public.courses c
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments en ON en.course_section_id = cs.id
LEFT JOIN public.course_evaluations ce ON ce.enrollment_id = en.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code ASC;

visualization.description: Average reported workload hours for each course
visualization.title: Average Reported Workload Hours by Course

result.sql:
SELECT
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.workload_hours)::numeric, 2) AS average_workload_hours
FROM public.courses c
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments en ON en.course_section_id = cs.id
LEFT JOIN public.course_evaluations ce ON ce.enrollment_id = en.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code ASC;
